mapper.insert: INSERT INTO elderly(name, gender, age, id_card, phone, address, health_status, family_name, family_phone, is_deleted) VALUES(#{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{idCard}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{healthStatus}, #{familyName}, #{familyPhone}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE elderly
name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, id_card = #{idCard}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, health_status = #{healthStatus}, family_name = #{familyName}, family_phone = #{familyPhone},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE elderly SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM elderly WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM elderly WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM elderly WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND is_deleted = 0
